title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking - Don't Allow - Enable Now - Allow While Using App [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Verify location tracking permission flow during onboarding: user declines initial permission, proceeds through login, then grants "While Using the App" location permission from Find My Device screen.
steps: Start app for the first time
Log in or continue as guest
Grant location permission with 'While Using the App' option
expected: After step 5, a location permission popup appears with options "Allow Once", "Allow While Using App", "Don't Allow" (Android shows "Only This Time" instead of "Allow Once") and text explaining Poly Lens uses location to find devices. After step 10, a permission window with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" appears with FMD screen visible in background. After step 11, app navigates to settings. After step 13, FMD screen is open and permission window is dismissed.
